effects: Attack, Block and Dodge Stamina use -80%

recipes.name: Love Potion
recipes.notes: Purchased from Haldor for 110 Coins.

recipes.notes: Provides frost resistance.

recipes.name: Lox Cape
recipes.notes: Provides frost resistance.

recipes.name: Abyssal Harpoon
recipes.notes: Used to drag creatures. Does not break on hit.

recipes.name: Bronze
recipes.notes: Alloy — combine copper and tin.

recipes.notes: Used for farming — plant seeds and flatten terrain.

recipes.notes: Strong vs. skeletons and stonegolems.

recipes.name: Draugr Fang
recipes.notes: Shoots poison arrows; pairs well with Poison arrows for stacking DoT.

recipes.name: Serpent Scale Shield
recipes.notes: High block power; excellent vs. staggered enemies.

recipes.name: Porcupine
recipes.notes: Deals pierce and blunt damage; one of the strongest one-handed weapons.

recipes.name: Arbalest
recipes.notes: Does 0 base damage; bolts provide damage.

recipes.name: Dyrnwyn
recipes.notes: Legendary sword reforged from fragments. Upgrades beyond quality 2 require Black Forge levels not yet available in game.

recipes.name: Ashen Cape
recipes.notes: -10% attack stamina, -20% block stamina.

recipes.notes: Crossbow damage comes from bolts.
